description: Converts Markdown text to a Word (.docx) document with proper formatting for headers, bold/italic, tables, lists, and hyperlinks.
author: Mangosteen Tech

plugin.name: Markdown → Word (.docx)
plugin.description: Convert Markdown to a fully-formatted Word document (.docx). Supports H1–H6 headers, bold, italic, bold-italic, inline code, tables, ordered/unordered lists, blockquotes, horizontal rules, hyperlinks, and paragraphs.
